description_long: This object is a classic-style shotgun with a long, cylindrical barrel and a robust, rounded receiver. The barrel is smooth and extends well beyond the frame, with a small front sight visible at the muzzle. The grip is ergonomically curved and appears to be made of a lighter material, contrasting with the darker metal of the barrel and receiver. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a single trigger, with a hammer mechanism visible at the rear. The overall design is reminiscent of historical or traditional firearms, with a simple, utilitarian aesthetic and no visible modern attachments or embellishments.
description: A traditional shotgun with a long, dark barrel, rounded receiver, and a curved, lighter-colored grip. The design is simple and classic, featuring a rounded trigger guard and visible hammer.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the barrel, the curved grip, rounded trigger guard, and hammer.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the grip's width and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the grip, trigger guard, and barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and smooth with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_action_mechanism: single-action (external hammer visible, no pump or lever)
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
